commands.review_summary:
The PR threads route-aware generic message-tool delivery evidence through heartbeat reply payloads and suppresses heartbeat fallback text when that evidence matches the reply route.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main enters message_tool_only heartbeat mode but still treats generic free text as the heartbeat fallback payload when no heartbeat_respond payload exists.
